metadata.title: System Security Plan - Microsoft Entra ID MFA for Guest Users

system-characteristics.system-name: Microsoft Entra ID - Conditional Access MFA Enforcement
system-characteristics.description: Microsoft Entra ID tenant configured with Conditional Access policies to enforce multi-factor authentication for guest and external users accessing tenant resources.

information-types.title: Identity and Access Management Configuration
information-types.description: Conditional Access policy configuration controlling authentication requirements for guest users.

authorization-boundary.description: Microsoft Entra ID tenant Conditional Access policies governing guest user authentication.

users.title: Guest Users
users.description: External users invited to the tenant who access organizational resources.

components.title: Microsoft Entra ID Conditional Access
components.description: Cloud-based identity service providing Conditional Access policies that enforce MFA requirements on guest users before granting access to tenant resources.

control-implementation.description: Implementation of ISO 27001:2022 Annex A 8.5 via Microsoft Entra ID Conditional Access.

implemented-requirements.description: Guest users accessing tenant resources are required to complete multi-factor authentication via a Conditional Access policy in Microsoft Entra ID. The policy targets all guest and external user types, applies to all cloud applications, and enforces MFA as a required grant control. The policy is in the 'enabled' state, ensuring active enforcement rather than report-only mode.
